description: Gold evaluation set for the HK labour RAG system. Each question is labeled with the source document id(s) that should answer it (document-level relevance). A retrieved chunk counts as relevant if its source_id is in `relevant_sources`. This is a proxy for true chunk-level relevance and is a deliberately modest, honest labeling granularity (see EVALUATION.md).

questions.question: What is the statutory minimum wage rate in Hong Kong?
How is an employee's entitlement to paid annual leave determined?
How many rest days is an employee entitled to each month?
What sickness allowance are employees entitled to?
How much maternity leave can a female employee take?
What is the maximum commission an employment agency can charge a job seeker?
What are the licensing requirements to operate an employment agency?
What is the minimum allowable wage for a foreign domestic helper?
Does an employer have to provide food to a foreign domestic helper?
What accommodation must an employer provide to a foreign domestic helper?
What percentage must employers and employees each contribute to the MPF?
Within how many days must an employer enrol a new employee in an MPF scheme?
What compensation is available to an employee injured at work?
Is an employer required to take out employees' compensation insurance?
What wage and employment records must an employer keep?
How much notice is required to terminate a foreign domestic helper's employment contract?
What is long service payment and who is eligible for it?
Can a foreign domestic helper take up part-time work for another employer?
What household income is required to hire a foreign domestic helper?
What is an end of year payment under the Employment Ordinance?
